title: Fixes podman-remote save to directories does not work
body:
Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/9742
Signed-off-by: zhangguanzhang <zhangguanzhang@qq.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *zhangguanzhang* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [zhangguanzhang] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Someone will have to explain to me why this is being done on the server side?  Seems like the client knows what it is doing, and the server is not doing what the caller requested.  If I write a python client and ask for a directory, I will not have the majic available to convert, and will end up with a mess.  Or am I missing something?

> Someone will have to explain to me why this is being done on the server side? Seems like the client knows what it is doing, and the server is not doing what the caller requested. If I write a python client and ask for a directory, I will not have the majic available to convert, and will end up with a mess. Or am I missing something?

server side always return file bytes in one file：
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/6ff56ab50a10e2350013c4ff1bf4b8d5d7b5aa87/pkg/api/handlers/libpod/images.go#L230-L236

Well outvoted and it does fix a bug, so merging.
/lgtm
